recommendations.title: Review the failed bucket first
recommendations.detail: 0 products are in Other/Failed. Gold-labeling the top brand/token clusters will reduce visible failures fastest.

recommendations.title: Refresh CLIP coverage after big scrapes
recommendations.detail: 0 products have no matching CLIP audit row. Those cannot benefit from the vision fallback until `vision_category_audit.full.json` is regenerated.

recommendations.title: Prefer source-backed rules over broad keyword guessing
recommendations.detail: Use reliable source fields like Fresh Produce, retailer breadcrumbs, and product-detail metadata before adding keyword rules that can move drinks, supplements, or personal care into the wrong shelf.

recommendations.title: Use gold labels as training data
recommendations.detail: Pick representative products from repeated failed brands and product families. One good label can help a whole cluster through the local text model.
